data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for preferred channel override at subscription level.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Preferred channel override at subscription level' requirement, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The absence of concrete API reads or persisted state checks means that the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied based on the available information.
gaps: Preferred channel override at subscription level is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the preferred channel override requirement.
